description: The Institute for Iranian Studies at the University of St Andrews is one of the leading academic centres for the study of Iran in Europe. Founded in 2006 by [Ali M. Ansari](/people/ali-m-ansari), it provides expertise on Iran from late antiquity to the modern era. The university library holds over 6,000 Persian books. The institute offers an MLitt in Iranian Studies and hosts a regular seminar series featuring researchers from across Britain and Europe.
editorial_notes: Academic research centre at University of St Andrews School of History. Founded 2006 by Ali Ansari. Offers MLitt in Iranian Studies (on-campus and online).
